mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbound_order_item ( outbound_order_id, product_id, product_name_snapshot, specification_snapshot, unit_snapshot, quantity, unit_price, amount, remark ) VALUES ( #{outboundOrderId}, #{productId}, #{productNameSnapshot}, #{specificationSnapshot}, #{unitSnapshot}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{amount}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.product_id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, COALESCE(i.product_name_snapshot, p.product_name) AS productName, COALESCE(i.specification_snapshot, p.specification) AS specification, COALESCE(i.unit_snapshot, p.unit) AS unit, i.quantity AS quantity, i.unit_price AS unitPrice, i.amount, i.remark FROM outbound_order_item i LEFT JOIN product p ON i.product_id = p.id WHERE i.outbound_order_id = #{outboundOrderId} ORDER BY i.id ASC

SELECT id, outbound_order_id, product_id, product_name_snapshot, specification_snapshot, unit_snapshot, quantity, unit_price, amount, remark, created_time, updated_time FROM outbound_order_item WHERE outbound_order_id = #{outboundOrderId} ORDER BY id ASC
